# DataInsights AI - Enterprise Database Analytics Platform

This is a production-ready SaaS application for database insights and metrics using LLM-powered natural language queries.

## Project Overview
- Frontend: Next.js 14 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: FastAPI with Python, LangGraph for agentic AI
- Databases: Multi-database support (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB)
- AI: OpenAI GPT-4 for natural language to SQL conversion
- Deployment: Docker Compose for production

## Architecture
- Agentic AI with multi-step reasoning
- Real-time query execution with WebSocket support
- Multi-tenant architecture with JWT authentication
- Redis caching for performance optimization
- Comprehensive audit logging and query history

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow REST API best practices
- Implement proper error handling and validation
- Add comprehensive logging and monitoring
- Use environment variables for configuration
